'''''Death Star Drydock''''' was a [[Painting/Legends|painting]]<ref name="CGP" /> created after [[104 ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> set in the [[Drydock/Legends|drydock]] of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]]. It depicted five docked [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] and a [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]], which were connected to several smaller [[Starship/Legends|craft]] via cables. The bottom of the image featured a platform strewn with [[Paper/Legends|paper]] documents. On it,<ref name="CGP" /> the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]]<ref name="Dark Side">''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]''</ref> [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] stood next to an [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] in front of a [[Computer/Legends|computer]] which displayed schematics for a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]. Two celestial bodies were also visible in the [[Realspace/Legends|space]] outside the Death Star.<ref name="CGP" />

==Behind the scenes==
''Death Star Drydock'' appeared in "[[Celestia Galactica Photografica]]," a collection of [[in-universe]] illustrations by [[Ryan Church]] collected in ''[[Star Wars: Visionaries]]'', a [[2005]] [[Wikipedia:Graphic novel|graphic novel]] edited by [[Jeremy Barlow]].<ref name="CGP" />
